title: Bee Removal in Westbury, Long Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Westbury, Long Island. Safe, humane extraction starting at $350. Licensed experts serving Westbury residential and commercial properties. Call today!
intro: When bees establish colonies in your Westbury home or business, you need fast, professional removal to protect your property and family. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane bee removal services throughout Westbury and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians handle everything from small swarms to large established hives with care and expertise.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westbury residents and businesses for years with reliable, eco-conscious bee removal solutions. Our team combines local knowledge of Long Island's unique bee activity patterns with advanced removal techniques, ensuring your property is bee-free while protecting these important pollinators whenever possible.
localContext: Westbury's mix of residential neighborhoods, commercial districts along Old Country Road, and proximity to Eisenhower Park creates diverse environments where bees often nest in eaves, chimneys, and wall voids. The area's mature trees and gardens throughout the village attract honeybees and carpenter bees, making professional removal services essential for homeowners and business owners alike.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Westbury typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the colony size, location accessibility, and whether structural repairs are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Westbury property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Westbury and Long Island. Most removals are completed within 2-4 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach colonies may require additional time. We prioritize emergency situations where bees pose immediate safety risks.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we safely relocate honeybee colonies to local beekeepers and apiaries, supporting Long Island's ecosystem. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted removal methods that minimize environmental impact while ensuring your property's safety.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bee removal service includes complete hive extraction, thorough cleanup of honeycomb and pheromones, and sealing entry points to prevent re-infestation. We also provide a service guarantee, so if bees return to the same location within the warranty period, we'll address it at no additional charge.
